name: codex-blog
description: Codex-first blog creation, review, localization, media, and publishing support with deterministic workflow wrappers.

interface.shortDescription: Write, audit, localize, and ship blog content in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Blog is a Codex-native port of the 30-skill blog publishing suite from claude-blog. It bundles focused skills, five TOML agent profiles, deterministic workflow wrappers, Codex-aware installers, grouped requirements, and a preserved five-gate Blog Delivery Contract.
defaultPrompt: Write a sourced blog post about this topic.
Audit this draft against the Blog Delivery Contract.
Translate and localize this article for German and French markets.
